\tzpentry{ID3538}{Quantum Phase Angle Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3538 introduces Quantum Phase Angle Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \boxed{\,\phi_x(x_2,t)\;\propto\; e^{-((x+x_2)/2)^2/(2\sigma_R^2)}\;|x-x_2|^{|\ell|} e^{-(x-x_2)^2/(2\sigma_r(t)^2)} e^{i\ell\theta(x-x_2)}\; \int e^{\tfrac{i}{\hbar}p(x-x_2+x_0)}\tilde A(p)\,dp \,} \]
